indicators.name: cabinets and drawers
indicators.rationale: Cabinets and drawers are closed and do not provide easy access to storage or supplies needed for yoga practice.

indicators.name: counter space
indicators.rationale: Counter space is limited and not easily accessible for placing yoga mats or props.

indicators.name: sink
indicators.rationale: Sink is not easily accessible for cleaning yoga mats or hands after practice.

indicators.name: bottles
indicators.rationale: Bottles are not easily accessible for hydration during practice.

indicators.name: vases
indicators.rationale: Vases are not easily accessible for cleaning or placing props.

indicators.name: potted plants
indicators.rationale: Potted plants are not easily accessible for cleaning or placing props.

indicators.name: wall-brick
indicators.rationale: Brick wall is not easily accessible for cleaning or placing props.

indicators.name: wall-other-merged
indicators.rationale: Merged wall sections limit accessibility and visibility of potential storage or props.

indicators.name: shelf
indicators.rationale: Shelf is not easily accessible for placing yoga mats or props.

indicators.name: cabinet-merged
indicators.rationale: Merged cabinets limit accessibility and visibility of potential storage or props.

indicators.name: wall-other-merged
indicators.rationale: Merged wall sections limit accessibility and visibility of potential storage or props.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for yoga / stretching due to limited counter space, closed cabinets and drawers, and limited accessibility to storage or props. The presence of potted plants, vases, and bottles further limits the space's suitability for yoga practice.
